query:
-- 先查询重庆的cityId
SELECT id FROM cities WHERE name = '重庆' LIMIT 1;

-- 更新第一条记录的分红配置
UPDATE partner_cities 
SET 
  currentProfitStage = 1,
  profitRatioStage1Partner = 30,
  profitRatioStage1Brand = 70,
  profitRatioStage2APartner = 40,
  profitRatioStage2ABrand = 60,
  profitRatioStage2BPartner = 50,
  profitRatioStage2BBrand = 50,
  profitRatioStage3Partner = 60,
  profitRatioStage3Brand = 40,
  isInvestmentRecovered = 0
WHERE cityId = (SELECT id FROM cities WHERE name = '重庆' LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY id ASC
LIMIT 1;

-- 删除重庆的其他重复记录
DELETE FROM partner_cities
WHERE cityId = (SELECT id FROM cities WHERE name = '重庆' LIMIT 1)
AND id NOT IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT id FROM partner_cities 
    WHERE cityId = (SELECT id FROM cities WHERE name = '重庆' LIMIT 1)
    ORDER BY id ASC
    LIMIT 1
  ) as temp
);
